content:
Many learners understand English grammar but struggle to use natural, native-like expressions in real conversation. This event bridges that gap through immersive speaking practice.

## What you’ll learn
- Replace Chinglish with idiomatic, native-like expressions
- Reactivate stored grammar knowledge in real communication
- Improve fluency through intensive speaking practice and live correction

## Who it’s for
- Learners who want to sound more natural in spoken English
- Professionals aiming to improve spoken fluency quickly
- Participants who prefer hands-on, immersive learning environments
title: Off the Beaten Path
